source_filing: The Coca-Cola Company 10-K (CIK 21344), fiscal year ended December 31, 2025
original_text: Net operating revenues were $47,941 million in 2025, compared to $47,061 million in 2024, an increase of $880 million, or 2%.
modified_text: Coca-Cola's net operating revenues rose 2% to $47,941 million in 2025 from $47,061 million in 2024, an increase of $880 million.
claim: Coca-Cola's net operating revenues increased 2% (by $880 million) to $47,941 million in 2025.
citation_as_written: The Coca-Cola Company 10-K, FY2025, MD&A — Net Operating Revenues
notes: Control. Faithfully restates the source: same figures, direction, magnitude. No distortion.
